Apply security context to your pods and containers

Problem from trusted Checkov report:
Apply security context to your pods and containers

Risk from trusted Checkov report:
Missing pod/container security context weakens workload isolation.

Fix from trusted Checkov report:
Define pod and container securityContext settings such as runAsNonRoot and seccompProfile.
